protected_paths.description: Files and directories that require elevated approval to modify. Governance-class protected assets require Governance Steward authorization.

governance_only_paths.description: Foundational governance assets. Modification requires governance-class approval and Governance Steward authorization.

role_limited_paths.description: Paths that may only be modified by specific roles as part of their authorized workflow.

mappings.reason: Policy manifests are governance assets or elevated operational configuration. Builders may execute contracted changes only with the required approval class and Governance Steward authorization.
Core policy manifests are portable governance assets. Builders may execute contracted changes only with governance-class approval and Governance Steward authorization.
Changelog entries are produced by builders and reviewed for release integrity.
Workflow definitions affect process enforcement and require planning or governance authority.
Wiki content is maintained by builders and audited by documentation managers.

approval_required_paths.description: Paths that require a minimum approval class before merge is permitted.

mappings.reason: Constitutional document requires full governance review.
Root agent operating rules are protected governance instructions.
Root policy documents are protected governance assets.
Compliance rule registry encodes governance policy.
Repository boundary registry controls protected path handling.
Documentation sync registry encodes documentation policy enforcement.
Versioning registry encodes release policy enforcement.
Changelog registry encodes release and changelog policy enforcement.
Core policy registries are portable governance assets.
CODEOWNERS changes affect governance review routing.
Workflow changes affect enforcement execution and require elevated review.
Label registry changes affect workflow metadata and triage.
Label mirror changes affect workflow metadata and triage.

notes: Path patterns use glob syntax. ** matches any depth of directories.
When a file matches multiple mappings, the most restrictive rule applies.
Emergency approval may override standard and sensitive approval requirements but never governance-class requirements.
GitHub workflow wrappers must consume this registry rather than redefining rule meanings.
